message.content: Add rate limiting to the login endpoint

content.thinking: Token-bucket per IP is simplest; wire it into the login route and return 429 on overflow.

content.text: I'll add a token-bucket limiter and wire it into the login route.
Done — login is now capped at **5 requests/min per IP**, returning 429 on overflow.

message.content: Now add a test for it

content.text: Adding a test that fires 6 rapid requests and asserts the 6th is 429.
Test passes ✅ — the limiter blocks the 6th request within the window.
